\vspace{0.5em}\footnotesize Notes: The validation sample consists of issuer-level Codex surrogate nominal-exit labels that overlap with independently human-validated gold-standard cases. The raw precision is the share of overlap issuers for which a surrogate nominal-exit label matches the gold-standard label. The smoothed rate uses a Jeffreys correction, $(x+0.5)/(n+1)$, and the conservative rate is the Wilson 95 percent lower bound. This table validates the current surrogate rule as a high-precision nominal-exit screen. It does not treat unresolved rows as negative outcomes or use raw surrogate labels as final labels.
\end{minipage}
